notes: All-metal build typical of Leica SL primes; heavier than most 35mm f/2 lenses in this class.
notesZh: 全金属机身是徕卡 SL 定焦头的典型做法，比同规格的大多数 35mm f/2 镜头更重。

notes: One of the launch lenses for the Leica SL system.
notesZh: 徕卡 SL 系统的首发镜头之一。

notes: APO-corrected telephoto prime, praised for near-zero chromatic aberration.
notesZh: APO 复消色差长焦定焦头，色差控制接近于零，广受好评。

notes: Standard zoom launch lens for the Leica SL system.
notesZh: 徕卡 SL 系统的首发标准变焦头。

notes: Telephoto zoom counterpart to the 24-70mm launch lens.
notesZh: 与 24-70mm 首发镜头搭配的长焦变焦头。

notes: Kit-style standard zoom for the Lumix S system with close-focus macro capability.
notesZh: Lumix S 系统的套机式标准变焦头，具备近摄微距能力。

notes: Part of Panasonic's flagship PRO line co-engineered with Leica optical standards.
notesZh: 松下旗舰 PRO 系列之一，与徕卡共同制定光学标准。

notes: Professional telephoto zoom with dual-mode dust/splash resistant construction.
notesZh: 专业级长焦变焦头，采用双重防尘防溅结构。

notes: Compact, lightweight kit zoom bundled with entry-level Lumix S bodies.
notesZh: 紧凑轻便的套机变焦头，常随入门级 Lumix S 机身搭售。

notes: Compact, budget-friendly portrait prime for the Lumix S line.
notesZh: Lumix S 系列里紧凑、平价的人像定焦头。

notes: True 1:1 macro reproduction ratio in a compact, lightweight body.
notesZh: 机身紧凑轻便，可实现真正的 1:1 微距放大倍率。

notes: Redesigned mirrorless-native version of Sigma's popular 35mm Art prime.
notesZh: 适马人气 35mm Art 定焦头的无反原生重新设计版本。

notes: Popular for astro and landscape work due to low coma at f/1.4.
notesZh: f/1.4 光圈下彗差控制出色，深受星空摄影和风光摄影爱好者喜爱。

notes: Part of the I-series all-metal compact prime lineup.
notesZh: I 系列全金属紧凑定焦头阵容之一。

notes: Affordable super-telephoto zoom for wildlife and sports.
notesZh: 价格亲民的超长焦变焦头，适合野生动物和体育摄影。

notes: Compact f/2.8 standard zoom, notably lighter than most competitors.
notesZh: 紧凑型 f/2.8 标准变焦头，比大多数同类竞品更轻。

notes: 1:1 macro prime built to Sigma's Art-line optical standard.
notesZh: 按适马 Art 系列光学标准打造的 1:1 微距定焦头。

notes: Flagship Sports-line super-telephoto zoom with 1:1 macro capability at 600mm.
notesZh: Sports 系列旗舰超长焦变焦头，600mm 端也能实现 1:1 微距放大。

notes: Budget full-frame autofocus prime; L-mount firmware/version added after initial Sony E release.
notesZh: 平价全画幅自动对焦定焦头；L 卡口固件/版本是在索尼 E 卡口首发后追加的。

notes: Very compact and light; popular low-cost nifty-fifty alternative.
notesZh: 体积小巧重量轻，是热门的平价标准定焦头替代选择。

notes: Second-generation version adds weather sealing over the original AF 85mm F1.8.
notesZh: 第二代版本相比初代 AF 85mm F1.8 增加了防尘防滴密封。

notes: APS-C prime (roughly 35mm full-frame equivalent field of view).
notesZh: APS-C 画幅定焦头（等效全画幅约 35mm 视角）。

notes: Sirui's first full-frame autofocus lens and its debut L-Mount product, released alongside the brand joining the L-Mount Alliance.
notesZh: 思锐首款全画幅自动对焦镜头，也是其加入 L-Mount Alliance 后推出的首款 L 卡口产品。

notes: Second Aurora-series lens, expanding the AF lineup to wide-angle; ships in Sony E, Nikon Z, Fuji X, and L-mount versions.
notesZh: Aurora 系列第二款镜头，将自动对焦阵容扩展到广角端，提供索尼 E、尼康 Z、富士 X 和 L 卡口版本。

notes: All-manual budget prime with all-metal construction; cross-mount, including L-mount.
notesZh: 全手动对焦的平价定焦头，全金属机身，支持多种卡口，包括 L 卡口。

notes: Fast manual-focus wide-angle prime aimed at astro and landscape shooters.
notesZh: 大光圈手动对焦广角定焦头，主打星空与风光摄影。

notes: Entry-level manual prime, roughly 52.5mm full-frame equivalent on APS-C.
notesZh: 入门级手动定焦头，在 APS-C 画幅上等效全画幅约 52.5mm 视角。

notes: Budget 1:1 manual-focus macro lens for APS-C bodies.
notesZh: 面向 APS-C 机身的平价 1:1 手动对焦微距镜头。

notes: Near-zero optical distortion ultra-wide, popular for architecture and astro.
notesZh: 近乎零畸变的超广角镜头，常用于建筑摄影和星空摄影。

notes: Reaches 2:1 magnification, double a standard 1:1 macro lens.
notesZh: 可实现 2:1 放大倍率，是标准 1:1 微距镜头的两倍。

notes: APS-C ultra-wide constant-f/2.8 zoom whose weather sealing is limited to a rubber gasket at the mount rather than a full dust/splash-resistant barrel.
notesZh: APS-C 画幅恒定 f/2.8 超广角变焦头，防护仅限于卡口处的橡胶密封圈，并非全金属桶身的防尘防溅结构。

notes: Ultra-wide full-frame f/2.8 zoom with a bulbous front element that precludes front filters, using a rear gel-filter holder instead.
notesZh: 全画幅 f/2.8 超广角变焦头，前镜片呈球面凸起无法安装前置滤镜，改用后置凝胶滤镜插槽。

notes: Compact full-frame wide-angle zoom; independent reviews note the weather sealing is limited to a mount gasket rather than full barrel sealing.
notesZh: 紧凑型全画幅广角变焦头；据多方评测，其防护仅限于卡口处密封圈，并非整支镜身的防尘防溅结构。

notes: 18.75x APS-C superzoom giving roughly 24-450mm full-frame-equivalent coverage in a single lens with OS2 stabilization.
notesZh: 18.75 倍 APS-C 超级变焦头，单支镜头即可覆盖等效全画幅约 24-450mm 焦段，配备 OS2 防抖。

notes: Compact constant-f/2.8 standard zoom for APS-C, roughly equivalent to 27-75mm in full-frame terms; mount-only rubber sealing.
notesZh: APS-C 画幅恒定 f/2.8 紧凑标准变焦头，等效全画幅约 27-75mm，仅卡口处有橡胶密封。

notes: Marketed as the world's first full-frame 10x zoom for mirrorless; the official name omits OS and DN because it has no in-lens stabilization and relies on in-body IS.
notesZh: 官方宣传为全球首款全画幅无反 10 倍变焦头；官方型号名省略了 OS 和 DN 字样，因为它没有镜头内防抖，依赖机身防抖。

notes: Original DG DN Art standard zoom (later joined by a lighter 24-70mm F2.8 DG DN II Art in 2024); notable for higher magnification at the wide end than the tele end.
notesZh: 初代 DG DN Art 标准变焦头（2024 年推出更轻的 24-70mm F2.8 DG DN II Art 后继续在售）；广角端的放大倍率反而高于长焦端。

notes: World's first full-frame zoom with a constant F1.8 maximum aperture across its entire focal range.
notesZh: 全球首款全焦段恒定 F1.8 光圈的全画幅变焦头。

notes: Constant-f/2.8 standard-to-telephoto zoom that maintains a fixed 0.40m minimum focus distance across the entire focal range.
notesZh: 恒定 f/2.8 标准至中长焦变焦头，全焦段最近对焦距离都固定在 0.40 米。

notes: 10x super-telephoto zoom reaching 600mm, with peak 0.417x magnification achieved around 200mm rather than at either zoom extreme.
notesZh: 10 倍超长焦变焦头，最长可达 600mm；0.417 倍的最大放大倍率出现在约 200mm 焦段，而非两端极值处。

notes: Constant-f/2.8 telephoto zoom with unusually worse close-focus at the tele end (1.00m) than at the wide end (0.65m).
notesZh: 恒定 f/2.8 长焦变焦头，比较特殊的是长焦端（1.00 米）最近对焦距离反而比广角端（0.65 米）更远。

notes: Samyang's first L-Mount Alliance lens, a weather-sealed f/2-2.8 varying-aperture zoom released in July 2024.
notesZh: 三阳/森养首款 L-Mount Alliance 镜头，2024 年 7 月发布，防尘防滴，光圈随焦段在 f/2 至 f/2.8 间变化。

notes: Viltrox's first L-Mount Alliance lens, a weather-sealed ultra-wide prime released in February 2026.
notesZh: 唯卓仕首款 L-Mount Alliance 镜头，2026 年 2 月发布，防尘防滴的超广角定焦头。

notes: Part of 7Artisans' newer AF autofocus lineup (distinct from its older manual-focus lenses); not weather sealed; L-mount version released September 2025.
notesZh: 属于七工匠较新的 AF 自动对焦系列（区别于其早期的手动对焦镜头）；不具备防尘防滴；L 卡口版本于 2025 年 9 月发布。

notes: 7Artisans' AF autofocus 35mm prime (distinct from the older manual-focus 7Artisans 35mm f/1.4); has only a mount-area gasket rather than full weather sealing; maximum magnification is a best estimate based on its 0.4m minimum focus distance since no official figure was published.
notesZh: 七工匠 AF 自动对焦 35mm 定焦头（区别于旧款手动对焦的七工匠 35mm f/1.4）；仅卡口处有密封圈，非全面防尘防滴；由于官方未公布最大放大倍率数据，此处数值是根据 0.4 米最近对焦距离估算得出。

notes: 7Artisans' first-ever autofocus lens; not weather sealed; the L-mount version was released in April 2025, after the original Sony E-mount launch.
notesZh: 七工匠首款自动对焦镜头；不具备防尘防滴；L 卡口版本于 2025 年 4 月发布，晚于索尼 E 卡口首发。

notes: 7Artisans' AF autofocus portrait prime; not weather sealed; the L-mount version was released in May 2025, after the original Sony E-mount launch.
notesZh: 七工匠 AF 自动对焦人像定焦头；不具备防尘防滴；L 卡口版本于 2025 年 5 月发布，晚于索尼 E 卡口首发。

notes: TTArtisan's first autofocus L-Mount lens, a compact all-metal pancake-style prime with a USB-C firmware port; maximum magnification is a best estimate since TTArtisan does not publish an official figure.
notesZh: 铭匠光学首款自动对焦 L 卡口镜头，紧凑饼干头造型，全金属机身，配备 USB-C 固件升级接口；由于官方未公布最大放大倍率数据，此处为估算值。

notes: TTArtisan's first full-frame lens and second autofocus L-Mount prime; all-metal build with no weather sealing or stabilization; maximum magnification is a best estimate since TTArtisan does not publish an official figure.
notesZh: 铭匠光学首款全画幅镜头，也是其第二款自动对焦 L 卡口定焦头；全金属机身，不具备防尘防滴或防抖；由于官方未公布最大放大倍率数据，此处为估算值。

notes: Official Leica datasheet lists 386 g weight (without hood), E67 filter thread, and a 0.2 m working distance across the zoom range.
notesZh: 徕卡官方数据表标注重量 386 克（不含遮光罩）、E67 滤镜口径，全焦段工作距离为 0.2 米。

notes: Official Leica datasheet lists 990 g weight, E82 filter thread, no built-in optical image stabilization, and dust/moisture-sealed construction.
notesZh: 徕卡官方数据表标注重量 990 克、E82 滤镜口径，无内置光学防抖，具备防尘防潮密封结构。

notes: Official Leica datasheet lists 256 g weight (without hood), E52 filter thread, and maximum magnification of 1:7.5 at 56mm.
notesZh: 徕卡官方数据表标注重量 256 克（不含遮光罩）、E52 滤镜口径，56mm 端最大放大倍率为 1:7.5。

notes: Official Leica datasheet lists 1140 g weight, E82 filter thread, integrated multi-axis optical image stabilization rated at 3.5 stops (CIPA), and dust/moisture-sealed construction.
notesZh: 徕卡官方数据表标注重量 1140 克、E82 滤镜口径，内置多轴光学防抖（CIPA 标准约 3.5 档），具备防尘防潮密封结构。

notes: Official Leica datasheet lists 500 g weight (without hood), E60 filter thread, and maximum magnification of 1:8.0 at 135mm with apochromatic correction.
notesZh: 徕卡官方数据表标注重量 500 克（不含遮光罩）、E60 滤镜口径，135mm 端配合复消色差校正可达 1:8.0 最大放大倍率。

notes: Variable-aperture full-frame telephoto zoom with built-in multi-axis optical stabilization (rated approximately 4 stops) and gasketed weather sealing.
notesZh: 光圈可变的全画幅长焦变焦头，内置多轴光学防抖（约 4 档），配备防尘防潮密封垫圈。

notes: Pancake-style APS-C wide-angle prime (27mm full-frame equivalent) with an all-metal barrel and no weather sealing.
notesZh: 饼干头造型的 APS-C 广角定焦头（等效全画幅约 27mm），全金属镜身，不具备防尘防滴。

notes: World's first APO-corrected 21mm full-frame prime, using a Dual Synchro Drive autofocus motor and AquaDura weather-sealed coating.
notesZh: 全球首款复消色差校正的全画幅 21mm 定焦头，采用双重同步驱动自动对焦马达和 AquaDura 防水涂层。

notes: APS-C standard prime with a 35mm full-frame-equivalent field of view, originally launched for the Leica T.
notesZh: APS-C 标准定焦头，等效全画幅约 35mm 视角，最初为徕卡 T 系统而生。

notes: Fast APS-C prime equivalent to 52.5mm, Leica's brightest native TL-mount lens with an internal focusing design.
notesZh: 大光圈 APS-C 定焦头，等效全画幅约 52.5mm，是徕卡原生 TL 卡口镜头中光圈最大的一款，采用内对焦设计。

notes: Apochromatic prime with Dual Syncro Drive stepping-motor autofocus, dust/moisture sealing, and no built-in image stabilization, released 2019.
notesZh: 复消色差定焦头，配备双重同步驱动步进马达自动对焦，具备防尘防潮密封，无内置防抖，2019 年发布。

notes: Lighter, non-apochromatic redesign released 2023, roughly half the weight of the earlier APO-Summicron-SL 50mm f/2, with no built-in image stabilization.
notesZh: 2023 年发布的更轻量、非复消色差重新设计版本，重量约为早期 APO-Summicron-SL 50mm f/2 的一半，无内置防抖。

notes: Apochromatic 12-element/10-group design announced August 2019, predating the lighter non-APO Summicron-SL 50mm f/2 released in 2023; no built-in image stabilization.
notesZh: 2019 年 8 月发布的复消色差 12 片 10 组光学结构，早于 2023 年发布的更轻量非 APO 版 Summicron-SL 50mm f/2；无内置防抖。

notes: True 1:1 macro prime for T/TL/CL APS-C mount, announced September 2016, lacks weather sealing and built-in stabilization.
notesZh: 面向 T/TL/CL APS-C 卡口的真 1:1 微距定焦头，2016 年 9 月发布，不具备防尘防滴或内置防抖。

notes: Apochromatic portrait prime announced January 2018 with sealed metal housing and Dual Syncro Drive autofocus, no built-in image stabilization.
notesZh: 复消色差人像定焦头，2018 年 1 月发布，配备密封金属机身和双重同步驱动自动对焦，无内置防抖。

notes: Designed primarily for astrophotography, it has a built-in tripod collar and a rear gel-filter holder instead of a front filter thread.
notesZh: 主要面向星空摄影设计，内置三脚架环，并配备后置凝胶滤镜插槽而非前置滤镜口。

notes: Originally released for DSLR mounts in 2017, Sigma later added a native L-Mount SKU that retains the older HSM autofocus motor rather than a DN linear motor.
notesZh: 最初于 2017 年为单反卡口发布，适马后续推出的原生 L 卡口版本仍保留旧款 HSM 自动对焦马达，而非 DN 直线马达。

model: 15mm F1.4 DG DN Diagonal Fisheye Art
notes: The world's first 180-degree diagonal fisheye lens for full-frame mirrorless with an f/1.4 maximum aperture.
notesZh: 全球首款光圈达 f/1.4 的全画幅 180 度对角鱼眼镜头。

notes: Roughly a 24mm-equivalent field of view on APS-C, making it a popular fast wide-angle prime for Sigma fp/fp L crop-mode and other L-Mount APS-C bodies.
notesZh: 在 APS-C 画幅上等效约 24mm 视角，是适马 fp/fp L 裁切模式及其他 L 卡口 APS-C 机身上颇受欢迎的大光圈广角定焦头。

notes: Part of Sigma's compact all-metal I-series, it has an unusually close 12cm minimum focus distance for a 17mm lens.
notesZh: 适马紧凑型全金属 I 系列成员，作为 17mm 定焦头，其 12 厘米的最近对焦距离十分出色。

notes: Features a rear filter holder, manual focus lock switch, and lens heater retainer aimed at astrophotographers.
notesZh: 配备后置滤镜插槽、手动对焦锁定开关和镜头加热器固定环，专为星空摄影设计。

notes: A compact, budget-friendly companion to the 20mm F1.4 Art, weighing less than half as much.
notesZh: 20mm F1.4 Art 的紧凑平价搭档，重量不到其一半。

notes: Roughly a 35mm-equivalent field of view on APS-C, giving a fast standard-ish prime for L-Mount crop-sensor shooting.
notesZh: 在 APS-C 画幅上等效约 35mm 视角，为 L 卡口画幅拍摄提供了一支大光圈的准标头。

notes: Announced alongside the 90mm F2.8 DG DN Contemporary as a matched compact pair.
notesZh: 与 90mm F2.8 DG DN Contemporary 同期发布，组成一对紧凑搭档。

notes: Part of the compact I-series line, notable for an unusually high 1:2 maximum magnification for a 24mm lens.
notesZh: 紧凑型 I 系列成员，作为 24mm 定焦头，1:2 的最大放大倍率相当罕见。

notes: Originally launched in 2016 for other mounts; the native L-Mount version arrived in mid-2020 with dust and splash resistance added.
notesZh: 最初于 2016 年为其他卡口推出，原生 L 卡口版本于 2020 年中上市，并加入了防尘防溅结构。

notes: The original first-generation model, now discontinued and succeeded by the smaller, lighter 35mm F1.2 DG II Art.
notesZh: 初代设计，现已停产，由更小更轻的 35mm F1.2 DG II Art 接替。

notes: Second-generation redesign that is about 30 percent lighter than the original, with a smaller 72mm filter thread and dual linear-motor autofocus.
notesZh: 第二代重新设计版本，比初代轻约 30%，滤镜口径缩小至 72mm，配备双直线马达自动对焦。

notes: Part of the original three-lens I-series launch alongside the 24mm F3.5 and 65mm F2.
notesZh: 与 24mm F3.5、65mm F2 同属初代三支一组的 I 系列首发阵容。

notes: Announced in 2018 for DSLR mounts and Sony E; a native L-Mount SKU began shipping in December 2019 and remains a DG HSM design, not DG DN.
notesZh: 2018 年为单反卡口和索尼 E 卡口发布；原生 L 卡口版本于 2019 年 12 月上市，仍为 DG HSM 设计而非 DG DN。

notes: An ultra-compact all-metal pancake-style prime, also sold in a silver colorway.
notesZh: 超紧凑全金属饼干头造型定焦头，也有银色款可选。

notes: A ground-up mirrorless-native redesign of Sigma's classic 50mm F1.4 Art, considerably smaller and lighter than the original DSLR-era version.
notesZh: 对适马经典 50mm F1.4 Art 定焦头进行的无反原生彻底重新设计，比单反时代版本明显更小更轻。

notes: A budget-friendly compact standard prime completing the F2 DG DN Contemporary trio with the 24mm and 90mm.
notesZh: 平价紧凑标准定焦头，与 24mm、90mm 共同组成 F2 DG DN Contemporary 三件套。

notes: Roughly an 84mm-equivalent field of view on APS-C, making it a popular fast portrait prime for L-Mount crop bodies.
notesZh: 在 APS-C 画幅上等效约 84mm 视角，是 L 卡口画幅机身上颇受欢迎的大光圈人像定焦头。

notes: A true 1:1 macro lens; Sigma deliberately omitted optical stabilization to prioritize optical performance, and sealing is limited to a mount gasket rather than full-barrel weather resistance.
notesZh: 真 1:1 微距定焦头；适马为优先保证光学素质，特意未加入光学防抖，防护也仅限于卡口处密封圈而非整支镜身的防尘防溅结构。

notes: A compact I-series short telephoto prime; sealing is limited to a mount gasket rather than full-barrel weather resistance.
notesZh: 紧凑型 I 系列中长焦定焦头；防护仅限于卡口处密封圈，并非整支镜身的防尘防溅结构。

notes: Nicknamed the 'Bokeh Master'; announced in 2018 for DSLR mounts, with a native L-Mount SKU following in December 2019 while retaining the DG HSM (not DG DN) designation.
notesZh: 绰号"虚化大师"；2018 年为单反卡口发布，原生 L 卡口版本于 2019 年 12 月跟进，仍保留 DG HSM（而非 DG DN）设计。

notes: The world's first autofocus 135mm F1.4 lens; Sigma's official global name omits the usual 'DN' suffix despite being mirrorless-native only.
notesZh: 全球首款自动对焦 135mm F1.4 镜头；适马官方型号名省略了常见的"DN"后缀，尽管它是纯无反原生设计。

notes: The world's first F2 200mm prime for full-frame mirrorless, a completely new design offering up to 6.5 stops of stabilization.
notesZh: 全球首款全画幅无反 F2 光圈 200mm 定焦头，全新设计，最高可提供 6.5 档防抖效果。

notes: A remarkably lightweight super-telephoto prime for its class at 1,370g, offering up to 5.0 stops of stabilization.
notesZh: 同规格中格外轻便的超长焦定焦头，仅重 1370 克，最高可提供 5.0 档防抖效果。

notes: Meike's fastest wide-angle AF prime, announced August 2025; the L-mount version is slightly shorter and lighter (550g) than the Sony E copy.
notesZh: 美科目前最快的广角自动对焦定焦头，2025 年 8 月发布；L 卡口版本比索尼 E 卡口版本略短且更轻（550 克）。

notes: Entry-level AF wide prime launched September 2024 for Sony E, Nikon Z and L mount; minimum aperture and magnification are estimated since Meike does not publish them.
notesZh: 入门级自动对焦广角定焦头，2024 年 9 月发布，提供索尼 E、尼康 Z 和 L 卡口版本；由于美科未公布最小光圈和放大倍率数据，此处为估算值。

notes: Pro-tier redesign of Meike's 35mm STM lens with a metal body and click-stop aperture ring, released July 2025 for E/Z/L mounts.
notesZh: 美科 35mm STM 定焦头的 Pro 升级版，金属机身配合有级光圈环，2025 年 7 月发布，提供 E/Z/L 卡口版本。

notes: Budget standard AF prime added to L-mount in July 2024.
notesZh: 平价标准自动对焦定焦头，2024 年 7 月加入 L 卡口阵容。

notes: Pro-tier 55mm AF prime announced October 2024 for E/Z/L mounts, using a stepping motor with an auxiliary focus drive system.
notesZh: Pro 系列 55mm 自动对焦定焦头，2024 年 10 月发布，提供 E/Z/L 卡口版本，采用步进马达配合辅助对焦驱动系统。

notes: Meike's first budget 85mm f/1.4 AF prime, with the L-mount SKU confirmed shipping in July 2024.
notesZh: 美科首款平价 85mm f/1.4 自动对焦定焦头，L 卡口版本已确认于 2024 年 7 月开售。

notes: Second-generation 85mm f/1.4 'MIX' lens with a redesigned optical formula, officially released for E/Z/L mounts in May 2026.
notesZh: 第二代 85mm f/1.4 "MIX" 定焦头，重新设计光学结构，2026 年 5 月正式发布，提供 E/Z/L 卡口版本。

notes: Meike's original 85mm f/1.8 AF portrait prime; also sold under the 'SE' name once the Pro tier launched (treated here as the same optical lens, not a separate SKU).
notesZh: 美科最初的 85mm f/1.8 自动对焦人像定焦头；Pro 系列推出后也曾以"SE"命名销售（此处视为同一支光学镜头，不作为独立型号收录）。

notes: Pro-tier 85mm f/1.8 AF prime with a redesigned optical formula and click-stop aperture ring, announced November 2024 for E/Z/L mounts.
notesZh: Pro 系列 85mm f/1.8 自动对焦定焦头，重新设计光学结构并配备有级光圈环，2024 年 11 月发布，提供 E/Z/L 卡口版本。

notes: Unusually for an ultra-wide zoom, it has a conventional 77mm front filter thread and 0.5x macro magnification at the tele end.
notesZh: 作为一支超广角变焦头较为少见地配备了常规 77mm 前置滤镜口径，长焦端可实现 0.5 倍微距放大。

notes: A constant-f/4 PRO-series wide-angle zoom launched alongside the original LUMIX S1/S1R system.
notesZh: 恒定 f/4 光圈的 PRO 系列广角变焦头，随初代 LUMIX S1/S1R 系统一同发布。

notes: Marketed by Panasonic as the world's smallest and lightest full-frame L-Mount zoom at launch, designed as a kit lens for the compact LUMIX S9.
notesZh: 松下宣传为发布时全球最小最轻的全画幅 L 卡口变焦头，是专为紧凑机身 LUMIX S9 设计的套机镜头。

notes: A lighter, more compact constant-f/2.8 standard zoom released in 2025 alongside the LUMIX S1II/S1IIE, distinct from the earlier LUMIX S PRO 24-70mm F2.8.
notesZh: 2025 年随 LUMIX S1II/S1IIE 一同发布的更轻巧紧凑的恒定 f/2.8 标准变焦头，区别于早期的 LUMIX S PRO 24-70mm F2.8。

notes: The original constant-f/2.8 PRO standard zoom launched with the LUMIX S1/S1R system in 2019.
notesZh: 初代恒定 f/2.8 PRO 标准变焦头，2019 年随 LUMIX S1/S1R 系统一同发布。

notes: An all-in-one 7.1x superzoom with 0.5x (1:2) macro magnification.
notesZh: 一镜走天下的 7.1 倍超级变焦头，具备 0.5 倍（1:2）微距放大能力。

notes: The lighter, more compact companion to the LUMIX S PRO 70-200mm F2.8, launched with the original S1/S1R system in 2019.
notesZh: LUMIX S PRO 70-200mm F2.8 的轻量紧凑版搭档，2019 年随初代 S1/S1R 系统一同发布。

notes: Reaches 0.5x (1:2) macro magnification at 300mm, making it a compact telephoto-macro hybrid with in-lens O.I.S.
notesZh: 300mm 端可实现 0.5 倍（1:2）微距放大，是一支紧凑的长焦微距混合镜头，内置光学防抖。

notes: Panasonic's first ultra-telephoto zoom for the LUMIX S system, announced in September 2025 with a removable tripod collar.
notesZh: 松下为 LUMIX S 系统推出的首款超长焦变焦头，2025 年 9 月发布，配备可拆卸脚架环。

notes: The widest lens in Panasonic's compact, matched-size S 1.8 prime series aimed at hybrid photo/video shooters.
notesZh: 松下紧凑同规格 S 1.8 定焦系列中最广的一支，面向兼顾照片与视频拍摄的用户。

notes: Part of Panasonic's matched-size S 1.8 prime lineup, sharing external dimensions and controls with its siblings for gimbal use.
notesZh: 松下同规格 S 1.8 定焦系列成员之一，与同系列其他镜头共享外形尺寸和操控布局，便于稳定器使用。

notes: A compact standard-wide prime in Panasonic's S 1.8 series, sharing a common 67mm filter thread and control layout with its siblings.
notesZh: 松下 S 1.8 系列中紧凑的标准偏广角定焦头，与系列其他镜头共用 67mm 滤镜口径和操控布局。

notes: The newest and smallest lens in the S 1.8/f2 prime series, a pancake-style design with a fluorine-coated front element.
notesZh: S 1.8/f2 定焦系列中最新、最小的一支，饼干头造型，前镜片带氟涂层。

notes: A compact, affordable standard prime that completes Panasonic's matched-size S 1.8 lens series.
notesZh: 紧凑平价的标准定焦头，补全了松下同规格 S 1.8 镜头系列。
